mapper.insert: insert into osg_staff_schedule ( staff_id, week_scope, weekday, time_slot, is_available, available_hours, adjust_reason, notify_staff, operator_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{staffId}, #{weekScope}, #{weekday}, #{timeSlot}, #{isAvailable}, #{availableHours}, #{adjustReason}, #{notifyStaff}, #{operatorId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} ) on duplicate key update is_available = values(is_available), available_hours = values(available_hours), adjust_reason = values(adjust_reason), notify_staff = values(notify_staff), operator_id = values(operator_id), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = sysdate(), remark = values(remark)

insert into osg_staff_schedule ( staff_id, week_scope, weekday, time_slot, is_available, available_hours, adjust_reason, notify_staff, operator_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values
( #{schedule.staffId}, #{schedule.weekScope}, #{schedule.weekday}, #{schedule.timeSlot}, #{schedule.isAvailable}, #{schedule.availableHours}, #{schedule.adjustReason}, #{schedule.notifyStaff}, #{schedule.operatorId}, #{schedule.createBy}, sysdate(), #{schedule.updateBy}, sysdate(), #{schedule.remark} )
on duplicate key update is_available = values(is_available), available_hours = values(available_hours), adjust_reason = values(adjust_reason), notify_staff = values(notify_staff), operator_id = values(operator_id), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = sysdate(), remark = values(remark)
